source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Sends wolf spirits to attack the Bloons.

2.description: Nature's Wrath - all Druids in range get +1 pierce.

3.description: Brambles: Creates a spiked bush on the track that can pop 50 Bloons. Lasts multiple rounds if not destroyed.

4.description: Every 18 seconds creates a totem that slows all Bloons near the totem by 30%. Less effective vs MOAB-class Bloons.

5.description: Increased attack speed. Druids of the Jungle have increased range. Grants bonus cash generation to Druids.

6.description: Increased popping power and projectiles move faster.

8.description: Nature's ward totems slow Bloons 40%. All Druids in range get Camo detection.

9.description: Obyn deals more damage. Druids of the Storm create larger storms more frequently.

10.description: Wall of Trees: Summons a wall of trees across the track that destroy all Bloons that enter. When full, the trees burst into money.

11.description: Nature's Clarity - all Magic Monkeys in range get +5 range and +2 pierce, and Druids get an additional +1 pierce.

12.description: Increased attack speed and Magic Monkeys cooldowns reduced by 5%.

13.description: Further increased popping power and projectile speed.

15.description: Nature's Ward slows Bloons by 60%, and has reduced cooldown.

16.description: Brambles pop 500 Bloons each and can damage all Bloon types.

18.description: Improved Wrath - all Druid of Wrath pops start each round at 200.

20.description: Wall of Trees can hold a lot more Bloons, and has shorter cooldown.
